responses.electricityComment: Bill amounts are very high. The power cuts are very frequent.
responses.roadComment: Too many speed bumps. A lot of manholes which are left unlevelled right in the middle of the road.
responses.safetyComment: There must be more well lit street lights.
responses.loveText: My neighborhood is very calm and quiet. It is also very airy and feels fresh most of the time. There are a few problems here and there but the neighborhood is peaceful. It is also mostly clean but there is a big dump a few hundred meters away from my apartment.
responses.commentsText: The open gutters/sewers must be covered. There should be more greenery around the area. There is a need of more trees around the neighborhood.
